# goal: Align SmartCloud-X backend implementation to the SmartCloud development document by landing MongoDB mainline, Celery+Redis async mainline, real LangSmith tracing, an A2A protocol layer, the final Dify integration shape, and QA-002/003/004/007/010 closeout without regressing current green paths

# stop_condition: Stop when logs/supervisor-backend-alignment/state.json reaches unresolved_count 0, or when a true hard blocker is documented in logs/supervisor-backend-alignment/blockers.log and state.json with evidence

column7: Phase A baseline confirmed: unresolved_count=10; MongoDB/Celery/LangSmith/A2A are not yet on runtime mainline, Dify is only owner-local external adapter, and QA-002/003/004/007/010 remain open

[labels: mongodb-mainline, phase-b-integration] [REFINE] Landed Mongo document runtime code across orchestrator/research/marketing, added owner tests and compose wiring, and promoted a Mongo mainline change request; unresolved_count stays 10 until compose/live smoke validates the new runtime path

[labels: celery-mainline, marketing-poster-worker] [REFINE] Landed Celery + Redis mainline for marketing poster tasks with formal task routing, retry/time-limit/acks-late settings, worker compose entry, and owner tests; unresolved_count stays 10 until real worker smoke validates enqueue/consume/result-state

[labels: langsmith-tracing, blocked-external] [REFINE] Landed LangSmith SDK tracing on the orchestrator request and tool path, added config/compose wiring, and documented the current external blocker; unresolved_count stays 10 because live trace proof is blocked by missing LANGSMITH_API_KEY

[labels: a2a-protocol, jsonrpc-request-response] Landed an A2A-compatible orchestrator protocol surface with Agent Card discovery plus JSON-RPC SendMessage/GetTask, mapped contextId/task lifecycle onto existing session persistence, updated README/status docs, and reduced backend_alignment_unresolved_count from 10 to 9

[labels: dify-dataset-sync, blocked-external] [REFINE] Added Dify dataset push/sync beside the existing external adapter, unified disabled/configured/verified-live/blocked-external status across health and runtime snapshot, and verified the route through owner tests; unresolved_count remains 9 because real Dify credentials are unavailable

[labels: qa-tail-closeout, contract-sync] Resolved QA-002, QA-007, and QA-010 by upgrading the gateway 429 response with rate-limit headers, promoting a new shared persistence/backend matrix revision, and synchronizing tool-hub direct-invoke contract wording with current OpenAPI and QA docs, reducing backend_alignment_unresolved_count from 9 to 6

[labels: repo-browser-web-admin, fresh-runner-browser] Resolved QA-003 and QA-004 by adding a repo-root web-admin Playwright project and smoke spec, extending the root browser server launcher and QA helper port/dependency checks, and updating fresh-runner browser docs, reducing backend_alignment_unresolved_count from 6 to 4

[labels: docker-unavailable, external-credentials-missing] Blocked on external runtime prerequisites after reducing backend_alignment_unresolved_count to 4: MongoDB and Celery need compose-backed smoke but the local Docker engine is unavailable, LangSmith live proof needs LANGSMITH_API_KEY, and Dify live dataset-sync proof needs a real endpoint/key/dataset configuration
